author: Soul
description: Browse frontmatter properties and values with counts, search shortcuts, and delete actions. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

name: Property Values Browser

releases.author: SoulBits-Vibe

releases.name: Property Values Browser 0.2.2

releases.author: SoulBits-Vibe
releases.description: Patch release for Obsidian community review rescan. Assets are attached directly for distribution.
releases.name: Property Values Browser 0.2.1

releases.author: SoulBits-Vibe
releases.description:
## Changes

- Add right-click delete actions for properties and values.
- Remove a property from all matching notes after confirmation.
- Remove a value from all matching notes after confirmation, removing the property when no values remain.
releases.name: Property Values Browser 0.2.0

releases.author: SoulBits-Vibe
releases.description:
First working release of Property Values Browser.

- Browse Obsidian frontmatter properties by value
- Expand properties to see distinct values with counts
- Filter by property name or value
- Click counts/values to open matching Obsidian Search results
- Uses Obsidian's property type icons when available
releases.name: Property Values Browser v0.1.0
